h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner gradually internalizes the field:value distinction through repeated practice.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No pressure for reversal; tutor consistently guides with the same scaffolding method.

scored.recoheredEarlier: For y-axis I keep wanting to write “sales went up,” but that’s the trend sentence, so I should quote the label first and split it the same way.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The exchange is heading toward a correct y-axis entry, with the learner gradually internalizing the rule through repetition.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor responds to L1's intrusion with a repeated rule clarification and a focused task breakdown, but does not invent a new representational mechanism.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No tutor turn follows L4's revised framing; the transcript ends with the learner's insight and no further tutor uptake.
